query:
SELECT 
  SUM(CASE WHEN tenantId IS NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as null_tenant,
  SUM(CASE WHEN tenantId = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as tenant_1,
  SUM(CASE WHEN tenantId IS NOT NULL AND tenantId != 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as other_tenant
FROM calls WHERE createdAt >= '2026-02-03 06:00:00';
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway03.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 2bTLYzeacnuAd6z.root --database nusXfQu5XBTMz3NUCR6brb --execute SELECT 
  SUM(CASE WHEN tenantId IS NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as null_tenant,
  SUM(CASE WHEN tenantId = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as tenant_1,
  SUM(CASE WHEN tenantId IS NOT NULL AND tenantId != 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as other_tenant
FROM calls WHERE createdAt >= '2026-02-03 06:00:00';
